title: Claude Plans, Gemini Designs: One Workflow for Beautiful Frontends (LIVE)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a workflow combining Claude Opus for planning and copy, Gemini 3.5 Flash for UI design, and Opus for integrations and deployment. The approach leverages each model's strengths to generate visually appealing frontends efficiently.
